title: United Community Banks, Inc. Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend on Common Stock
author: Na
description: United Community Banks, Inc. (NYSE: UCB) announced that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per share on common stock, payable on July 3, 2026 to shareholders of record as of June 15, 2026. The company operates as a top-100 U.S. financial institution with $28.2 billion in assets across 200 offices in six southeastern states.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The announcement of a quarterly cash dividend demonstrates the company's financial strength and commitment to returning capital to shareholders. Regular dividend payments are typically viewed positively as they indicate stable earnings and management confidence in future performance.

title: United Community Banks, Inc. and Peach State Bancshares, Inc., The Parent of Peach State Bank & Trust, Announce Merger Agreement
author: Na
description: United Community Banks, Inc. (NYSE: UCB) announced a definitive merger agreement to acquire Peach State Bancshares, Inc. and its subsidiary Peach State Bank & Trust in a stock and cash transaction valued at $100.8 million. The merger is expected to close in Q3 2026 and is projected to be accretive to United's earnings per share by approximately $0.09 in 2027, or $0.12 with share repurchases. Peach State Bank, headquartered in Gainesville, Georgia, has $788 million in assets and two branches in Hall County.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The merger is strategically beneficial for United, strengthening its presence in the fast-growing Gainesville area. The deal is expected to be accretive to earnings per share ($0.09-$0.12 in 2027), aligns with acquisition criteria, and combines complementary cultures and operations. Management expresses enthusiasm about the partnership and synergies.

title: United Community Banks, Inc. Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
author: Na
description: United Community Banks, Inc. (NYSE: UCB) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on April 21, 2026, before market open, followed by a conference call at 9:00 a.m. EST to discuss financial results, business highlights, and outlook. The company operates 199 offices across six southeastern states with $28 billion in assets as of December 31, 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article is a routine announcement of earnings release date and conference call details. It contains standard corporate communications with no material news, financial performance data, or forward-looking statements that would indicate positive or negative sentiment. The promotional content about awards and recognition is excluded from sentiment analysis as instructed.

title: United Community Banks, Inc. Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend On Common Stock
author: Globe Newswire
description: United Community Banks, Inc. declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per share, payable on January 5, 2026, to shareholders of record as of December 15, 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company announced a consistent dividend payment, indicating financial stability and commitment to shareholders. The bank also highlighted multiple awards and strong performance metrics, suggesting a healthy business position.

title: Coalesce Launches JOIN: A Three-City Data Community Tour Featuring Joe Reis and Local Data Leaders
author: Joe Reis
description: Coalesce is hosting a three-city event series called JOIN, focusing on candid discussions about data and AI, featuring networking opportunities and insights from industry leaders across San Francisco, Atlanta, and Phoenix.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned as a participant with enterprise data platform expertise
